name: Shinwa Co., Ltd.
summary: Shinwa Co., Ltd. provides construction and logistic equipment in Japan. It offers system and general scaffolding equipment; hanging and mesh pallets; pallets for pipes, system scaffolding, and preceding handrails; and optional parts, such as pre-installed handrails. Shinwa Co., Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Kaizu, Japan.
